title: Fast Working Capital Document Prep Checklist

items.label: Business information
items.detail: Legal name, entity type, state, EIN status, and contact details.

items.label: Recent business bank statements
items.detail: Prepare the most recent 3 to 6 months when available.

items.label: Funding purpose notes
items.detail: Summarize how funds would be used and why now.

nextStep: Collect the strongest available documents before requesting a funding strategy review.
disclaimer: Document checklists are preparation guidance only. Actual requirements depend on review and funding path.
